visual_description: The scene takes place indoors, likely in a living room or hallway. Two men are having a conversation. The man on the left, wearing a pink and white plaid shirt, is facing the man on the right, who is wearing a blue and black plaid shirt over a white t-shirt. The man in the blue shirt turns his head sharply to his right, then back to the other man, with a look of surprise and concern on his face.
audio_description: A male voice speaks with a tone of surprise and concern, followed by another male voice speaking with a calm, reassuring tone. The first voice then speaks again, sounding more urgent and anxious.
